message:
🐛 fix(api): relax rate limiter on feedback submission (#9978)

* 🐛 fix(a11y): improve color contrast and remove stale INVENTORY entry

Replace hardcoded text-zinc-400/text-gray-300 with text-muted-foreground
semantic token in UI text, labels, and interactive elements across:
- EnterpriseComplianceCards.tsx
- NotFound.tsx
- EnterprisePortal.tsx
- ComplianceFrameworks.tsx
- ComplianceReports.tsx

Remove stale openfeature_status entry from INVENTORY.md.

Fixes #9972
Fixes #9973

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

* 🐛 fix(api): relax rate limiter on feedback submission

Fixes #9969

- Switch apiLimiter KeyGenerator from IP-only to CompositeKey
  (userID+IP for authenticated users, plain IP for anonymous).
  This prevents users behind shared NAT from exhausting each
  other's per-IP budget through normal background polling.

- Add a dedicated feedbackLimiter (10 req / user / hour) on
  POST /api/feedback/requests so issue submission has its own
  generous, per-user budget that is not consumed by unrelated
  API polling.  Returns Retry-After: 3600 when the limit fires.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

---------

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
